Events at Vino Venue
For over 12 years, Vino Venue has been serving Atlanta as a premier event destination for a range of corporate & private events. Let us help customize your next gathering to provide a unique culinary & beverage experience.
Submit an Inquiry
COOKING EXPERIENCES
Get ready for a hands-on experience with your personal chef as they entertain the group with food prep suggestions and guide you through recipes
Enjoy the meal you’ve created family-style alongside a wine pairing with your wine host
Make it a friendly competition with two chef teams -great for team building
Suggested Group Size: 8-22
Pricing starts at: $90 per person
CASUAL GATHERINGS
Reception style with selection of wines to taste and learn about with our knowledgeable staff
Includes a buffet of light bites and optional passed appetizers in a range of cuisines
Perfect for happy hour or networking
Suggested Group Size: 15-150
Pricing starts at: $55 per person
DINNERS & LUNCHEONS
Wide range of cuisine available from comfort to upscale
Buffet or seated options
Wines paired to your selections
Private and semi-private spaces available
Suggested Group Size: 12-90
Prices Start at: $40 for lunch, $65 for dinner
VENUE BUYOUTS
Reserve exclusive space for your group
Range of food, beverage, and experiences available
Audio/visual system available for presentations
Suggested Group Size: 40-150
Prices based on food & beverage minimums determined by the date and time of event, please inquire
ADD ONS
“Enomatic” Wine Cards for our cutting-edge wine dispensing machines which allow guests to taste 1 oz, half glass, or full glass from 32 different wines. Incorporate as a 30 min reception or as part of your event. Pricing starts at $22 per person
Beverage packages including liquor & specialty cocktails. Pricing starts at $15 per person
Impressive Passed Appetizer selections
Wine & Spirit educational tastings
Please inquire with your ideas!

--- Page: /pages/about-us ---
About Us – Wine Bar and Restaurant -Vino Venue
Skip to content
This site has limited support for your browser. We recommend switching to Edge, Chrome, Safari, or Firefox.
Wine Bar Reservations:
click
or call 770-668-0435 x0
OUR HISTORY
From Wine School to Wine Emporium
In August 2002, Michael Bryan decided to begin offering wine education courses to his friends—and their friends. Just as the American wine culture was seeing unprecedented change and growth, he noticed the power of people connecting with each other over wine.
In its first 2 years, Connect With Wine  ran wine classes, performed client tasting events, created large wine festivals called “Discover” events, and even took guests to experience Georgia’s burgeoning wine country.
It wasn’t long until newly inspired clientele began asking “where can I learn even more about wine?” This effort led to conceiving and opening the Atlanta Wine School (AWS), which offered its first course, Introduction to Wine, in September 2004.
With passionate instructors, and professional instructional offerings, AWS grew fast, landing in its own building in 2007. AWS’ humble formation helped to provide an informed path for the burgeoning wine curious. Not content to cast wine as solely an interesting libation, AWS’ charter was (and still is today) to represent wine as a symbol of good and fine living. AWS’ hosted group trips to wine country have caught national attention.
By 2009, it was evident to Bryan they owed more to their customers, so he drew up a business plan for a “wine emporium,” which was later to be named Vino Venue.
Vino Venue opened its doors in late October, 2012. We think Bob Townsend, writing for the Atlanta Journal & Constitution, described Vino Venue Best: “Vino Venue is a new multiple choice wine bar and retail emporium that offers shopping, tasting, dining, education and entertainment under one roof.”
Today, Vino Venue sees 3,000 attendees annually for wine and cooking classes – from novice to advanced learners. From corporate entertainment to your father’s 60th birthday party, Vino Venue will conduct approximately 300 private wine functions annually. Vino Venue provides a tasteful wine & dine experiences 7 days/nights per week in our dining room, and offers hand-picked wines for retail purchase daily as well as a wine club. And Vino Venue still takes groups to the wine country!
Vino Venue is the first organization to put all of these businesses under a single roof, all working seamlessly together.
The ability to provide all of these wine-centric services to his guests, was exactly what Bryan envisioned and then built. But what you may remember most about your visit is the people who are here to serve you at Vino Venue—we believe we have the most knowledgeable, helpful, wine-savvy, and friendly staff.
Services Under One Roof:
Wine-inspired cuisine
200 wines by the bottle
50 wines by the glass
32 wine dispensing machines - choose from a taste, to half a glass to a full glass
Artisanal beer

meta.meta_description: Vino Venue is a one-of-a-kind wine and dine emporium offering guests unique culinary experiences: a restaurant with bistro-style cuisine, 50 wines by the glass and craft beer, a wine retail store, private events, wine country travel and home of The Atlanta Wine & Cooking School.
